confirm_kill_msg: Terminate server process? Any progress since the last autosave will be lost.
control_invalid_ip: Invalid IP. Use IPv4, IPv6, 0.0.0.0, or ::.
restart_server_timeout: Server did not reach a stopped state in time; restart aborted.
server_log_history_truncated_hint: Only the end of the log is shown (last ~6 MB, up to 25,000 lines). Use “Load full file” to load everything.
server_log_history_load_full_too_large: File is too large to show in the browser ({0} MB). Open the log file on the server.
server_log_history_missing: No log file yet — start the server once to create it.
server_log_history_disabled: Server log is turned off. Turn it on to record and show log output here.
maintenance_help_intro: Maintenance is optional — you can stop servers, update Factorio and mods, and restart them manually at any time without creating tasks. Tasks automate those steps on a schedule or on your command, and keep reports of what was done, when, and by whom. After a run a server may stay locked during updates or wait for you in manual mode — see the sections below.
maintenance_help_tasks_text: The Planned tasks tab lists all your maintenance jobs.
maintenance_help_tasks_b1: Each card shows whether the task is on, its schedule, target servers, and the next run time.
maintenance_help_tasks_b2: Press + to create a task. The red stop button turns off every active task.
maintenance_help_task_edit_text: Click a task card to open its menu.
maintenance_help_task_edit_b1: Edit — change name, schedule, servers, and the step sequence.
maintenance_help_task_edit_b2: Enable / Disable — pause the task without deleting it.
maintenance_help_task_edit_b3: Run now — start the task immediately, outside the normal schedule.
maintenance_help_schedule_text: In the task editor you choose when the task runs and which servers it affects.
maintenance_help_schedule_b1: Scheduled — pick days and time; the task runs automatically.
maintenance_help_schedule_b2: Manual only — the task runs only when you click Run now.
maintenance_help_schedule_b3: Pick one server, several, or all. Each step runs in order (stop, update, start, and so on).
maintenance_help_manual_text: When a task updates Factorio or mods, the server is locked so it cannot be started by mistake.
maintenance_help_manual_b1: «Maint.» badge — Start is unavailable until the task finishes.
maintenance_help_manual_b2: The lock clears automatically when the task ends (whether it succeeded or failed).
maintenance_help_manual_tip: Not the same as «Manual» mode below — this lock applies only during automatic updates.
maintenance_help_manual_mode_text: If the task uses «Maintenance mode (Manual updates)», the server stops and waits for you.
maintenance_help_manual_mode_b1: «Manual» badge — Start stays available; use it after you finish your changes on disk.
maintenance_help_manual_mode_b2: The badge clears when the server reaches Running, or when you choose End maintenance.
maintenance_help_manual_mode_b3: End maintenance in the row menu (or on the Servers toolbar) clears the wait without starting the server.
maintenance_help_manual_mode_tip: If start fails, manual mode stays — fix the problem and try again, or end maintenance explicitly.
maintenance_help_reports_text: The Reports tab shows what maintenance has done.
maintenance_help_reports_b1: Click a row to see the full event timeline on the right.
maintenance_help_reports_b2: Filter by date, server, or event type to find older entries.
maintenance_help_reports_b3: Check that updates completed, read errors, and see what changed on each server.
maintenance_deactivate_all_confirm_msg:
Disable all {0} active maintenance tasks?

Scheduled runs will not start until you enable them again.
maintenance_error_invalid_scheduler_tz: Unknown timezone. Pick a name from the list.
maintenance_list_empty: No tasks yet. Click Add to create a maintenance task.
maintenance_opt_manual_only_hint: No schedule. Run from the task menu with Run now.
maintenance_repeat_once_hint: Off: one run, then the task turns off. No weekdays: once at the specified time.
maintenance_opt_update_mods: Update all mods to latest versions
maintenance_opt_stopped_mode_hint: In maintenance mode, the server is not started automatically. Start the server manually when done.
maintenance_opt_mods_game_version_label: If mod requires a newer server version
maintenance_report_detail_placeholder: Select a report on the left to view the full log.
maintenance_run_now_busy: Another maintenance task is already running.
maintenance_report_mods_cancelled_game_v: Mod update cancelled: {0} mod(s) need a newer Factorio version.
maintenance_report_stopped_mode: Server stopped; no automatic updates or start.
maintenance_report_diff_unchanged: No changes to server version or mod files since snapshot.
maintenance_chat_1m: Maintenance started. Server will be stopped in 1 minute.
mod_list_update_all_confirm_msg:
Updates will be downloaded for all mods that have newer versions on the portal. This may take a while.

Continue?
mod_list_changelog_not_found: changelog.txt was not found in the mod archive.
mod_list_update_new_deps_intro: Updating will also download these dependencies:
mod_list_update_all_new_deps_intro: Updating all mods will also download these new dependencies:
mod_update_all_requires_newer_game_lead: Some mods have portal updates that need a newer Factorio than this server ({0}):
mod_update_all_requires_newer_game_quest: Skip those mods, download them anyway, or cancel the update?
mod_update_game_version_skip_btn: Skip mods that need newer Factorio
mod_job_requires_newer_game_confirm: {0}: portal release requires Factorio {1} or newer (this server reports {2}). Use the confirmation dialog in the mod list and retry.
mod_job_requires_newer_game_hint: A portal release requires a newer Factorio version. Confirm the warning in the mod list and retry.
mod_list_upload_exists: A mod archive with this filename already exists.
mod_list_upload_select_file: Select one or more .zip mod archives and/or mod-settings.dat
mod_list_upload_invalid_settings: File is not a valid mod-settings.dat.
mod_list_upload_missing_deps_intro: Missing dependencies were detected for uploaded ZIP archives:
mod_list_upload_missing_deps_cancelled: Upload cancelled: uploaded mods were removed.
server_start_missing_deps_outro: Download them from the Factorio Mod Portal?
mod_list_remove_confirm: Delete “{0}” ({1}) from mod-list.json and delete its files from the mods folder?
mod_list_portal_credentials_missing: Set credentials in server-settings.json or configure Global username/Global token in panel settings.
mod_list_portal_no_release: No releases listed on the mod portal.
mod_job_already_running: A mod operation is already running.
mod_job_running_block_start: Wait for the mod operation to finish before starting the server.
mod_list_dl_skip_invalid_id: {0}: skipped ” invalid mod id (malformed dependency); not querying portal
mod_list_dl_err_http_404: HTTP 404 ” mod not found on the portal
mod_list_deps_question_intro: The following dependencies will be installed:
mod_list_conflicts_intro: These enabled mods conflict with the installation and will be disabled:
modpack_save_dialog_hint: The current mod list will be saved as a modpack.
modpack_export_dialog_hint: A .fcc file with mod list and versions will be created. When importing, FCC downloads mod files automatically.
modpack_export_dialog_no_settings: This modpack has no mod-settings.dat to include.
modpack_import_dialog_latest_versions_hi: During import, the latest available versions of mods are downloaded.
modpack_import_invalid_format: Not a valid FCC modpack file (.fcc): {0}
modpack_import_format_too_new: This .fcc file was created by a newer FCC version (format {0}). Update FCC.
modpack_import_no_mods: File contains no mods to import.
modpack_activate_dialog_lead: The server will switch to the mods from this modpack.
modpack_activate_dialog_warn_1: Currently installed mods will be replaced.
modpack_activate_dialog_warn_2: Mods not included in this modpack will be removed.
modpack_activate_requires_space_age: This modpack requires the Space Age expansion. Install Space Age or choose another modpack.
mod_requires_space_age: Mod «{0}» requires the Space Age expansion. Installation is not possible without the expansion.
modpack_rename_dialog_hint: Enter a new name for the modpack folder.
modpack_reset_confirm_msg:
Reset the mods folder?

All installed mods will be removed
mod-settings.dat will be deleted

Continue?
modpack_name_invalid: Invalid name. Letters, digits, spaces, _ and - are allowed.
modpack_name_exists: A modpack with this name already exists.
modpack_no_mods_in_folder: Mods folder is empty — nothing to save.
modpack_select_first: Select a modpack in the list first.
mod_settings_unsaved_msg: You have unsaved mod settings. Leave without saving?
server_not_running_msg: Server is not running. Start the server first.
server_running_mutate_blocked: Stop the server before this operation.
firewall_rule_ok_log: Firewall: inbound UDP allowed for game port {} ({})
firewall_rule_failed_log: Firewall: could not add inbound UDP allow rule — {}
firewall_web_startup_elevated: Running with privileges to change the firewall. Game port opened automatically.
firewall_web_startup_not_elevated: No firewall-changing privileges. Open ports when necessary yourself.
headless_autostart_issued: Autostart: start command issued for server "{}".
panel_startup_lan_blocked: Listen address is 127.0.0.1 — the panel is only reachable on this PC. Set listen_host=0.0.0.0 in fcc-settings.ini for LAN access.
panel_startup_default_password_warning: WARNING: Default admin password (admin/admin) is still active.
cannot_start_no_save: Server cannot start without a save file.
create_save_rename_failed: The save was created but could not be renamed to the chosen file name.
map_gen_preset_import_invalid: Not a valid FCC map preset file (.fcc)
fcc_import_wrong_kind: This .fcc file is not a modpack (contains field must be Modpack)
fcc_import_wrong_kind_map_preset: This .fcc file is not a modpack — use map preset import in the map generator
map_gen_preview_empty: Adjust settings to generate a preview
map_gen_exchange_export_help: Copy the string into the Factorio map generator or share it with others.
map_gen_exchange_help: Paste a string from the Factorio map generator (Ctrl+V). Settings are applied to the custom generator tab.
map_gen_preview_controls_hint: Drag to pan · Mouse wheel to zoom
map_gen_preview_tool_hint_pen: Drag to draw on the map
map_gen_preview_tool_hint_eraser: Click or drag to erase markup
server_settings_upload_confirm: Replace server-settings.json with the selected file?
reset_confirm_lead: Server settings will be restored to defaults.
reset_confirm_warn_1: All current settings will be lost.
reset_confirm_public_off_effect: Public visibility will be turned off.
reset_confirm_apply_credentials_effect: Global Factorio credentials will be added to the server settings.
whitelist_restart_required: Whitelist status changed. Restart the server for changes to take effect.
whitelist_clear_confirm_message: Remove all players from the whitelist?
confirm_delete_command: Are you sure you want to delete command "{}"?
about_description: Web panel for centralized management of Factorio servers
about_ui_icons_credit_intro: Toolbar, menu, and dialog icons throughout the application are from
about_factorio_assets_map_gen: Map generator preview icons — 2D sprites taken from the Factorio game files.
about_factorio_assets_sa_badge: Server list — the Space Age badge shown next to servers is an official Factorio icon.
about_nssm_credit: by Iain Patterson (public domain), bundled in Windows builds.
about_trademark_notice: Factorio is a registered trademark of Wube Software Ltd. Factorio Control Center is an independent third-party management tool. It is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Wube Software.
about_factorio_update_stop_server: Stop the Factorio server before updating the game installation.
about_factorio_update_no_credentials:
Could not find username and token.

Add them in Server Settings
web_update_error_server_path: Factorio server path is not set.
web_update_error_exe_not_found: factorio.exe was not found in the server folder.
web_update_error_target_version: The selected version is no longer available. Refresh and try again.
web_update_error_internal: Internal web update error. Check the server logs for details.
about_factorio_update_partial_ok: Update finished at version {0}. The last patch could not be downloaded; you are on the latest available stable release.
about_factorio_update_log_skip_ahead: Version {0} is ahead of planned {1}, skipping patch to {2}.
about_factorio_update_package_missing: Your account data does not list package "{0}" for the updater API.
about_factorio_update_version_unknown: Could not detect the installed Factorio version.
about_factorio_update_expansion_core_war: Space Age installation detected, but the updater is using base package "{0}" instead of an expansion package. Patches may fail with "unexpected content".
about_factorio_update_log_unexpected_con: Factorio reported 'unexpected content': the patch does not match the installed build (base vs expansion mismatch). Aborting.
confirm_delete_category: Are you sure you want to delete category "{}" and all its commands?
mods_from_save_summary: Mods in save: {0}, missing on server: {1}
mods_from_save_nothing_to_download: Nothing to download for the selected mode.
mods_from_save_prep_progress: Checking portal releases and Factorio version requirements…
items_editor_confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete item "{}"?
items_editor_no_items: No items configured. Click "Edit Items List" to add items.
server_settings_error_token_password_exc:
Only one of the Password or Token fields can be filled. 
Clear one of them.
server_settings_error_public_needs_auth:
Public visibility requires filling the Password or Token field. 
Fill one of them.
server_settings_hint_name: Server name as it will appear in the game listing.
server_settings_hint_description: Server description that will appear in the game listing.
saves_manager_running_active_save: Cannot delete or rename the active save
saves_manager_upload_exists: A save with this name already exists.
saves_manager_upload_invalid_archive: Not a Factorio save — the file must be a .zip containing level.dat or level-init.dat with a valid save header.
saves_manager_upload_invalid_zip: Could not read the file as a ZIP archive.
web_error_failed_fetch:
Could not connect to the panel.
Check that the server is running and reachable.
web_error_load_failed:
Could not load data from the panel.
Check that the web panel is running.
web_error_network: Network error while contacting the panel.
locale_bootstrap_failed: Could not load the interface language pack.
program_settings_group_interface_tip: Settings used as default for all users.
web_user_settings_intro: Personal interface preferences. They apply only to your account in this browser.
program_factorio_credentials_invalid: Factorio username or token is invalid. Check credentials on mods.factorio.com.
program_factorio_credentials_incomplete: Enter both Factorio username and token.
program_settings_group_web_tls_tip: When the panel is behind a reverse proxy or uses a domain name, set the public address and port for links; otherwise Address and Port are used.
web_panel_restart_confirm_msg: The web interface will disconnect while the panel restarts. This usually takes up to a minute — wait for the page to reload before using the panel again.
program_factorio_credentials_hint: Used for game package download, mods and updates
program_modpack_activate_use_symlinks_ti:
When enabled, .zip mods are linked instead of copied (saves disk space).
When off, files are copied to the server mods folder.
program_sync_group_tip: Shared administrator, ban, and whitelist lists for all servers.
program_show_server_list_mod_badges_cb: Show mod badges in server list
program_show_server_list_mod_badges_tip: Icons for Krastorio, Nullius, Space Exploration, and other major overhauls next to the server name.
program_toast_duration_sec_tip: How long corner notifications stay visible.
program_require_unique_game_ports_tip: Prevents using the same game port for multiple servers.
program_server_settings_default_public_o: When server-settings.json is created, visibility.public is set to false.
program_server_settings_apply_global_cre: Global credentials are copied into a newly created server-settings.json. Existing data is not modified.
program_log_rotation_group_tip: When a log file grows too large, the old file is kept as a copy and logging continues in a new file. Older copies beyond the limit are removed.
program_log_web_history_disabled: Web panel log is turned off. Turn it on to record events.
program_log_maintenance_history_disabled: Maintenance log is turned off. Turn it on to record scheduler events.
program_log_audit_history_disabled: Audit log is turned off. Turn it on to record changes to saves, mods, and settings.
program_log_history_missing: No log file yet — nothing has been recorded.
web_panel_tls_files_not_found_msg: Certificate or key file was not found at the given path.
web_panel_privileged_port_unix: [web_panel] Port {} is privileged on Unix/Linux (needs root or CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE). Use port ≥1024 in Custom mode, or Port mode Auto for 8080/8443.
web_access_help_intro: Manage who can sign in to Factorio Control Center and what they are allowed to do. Only administrators see this tab. Changes take effect on the user's next sign-in or page refresh.
web_access_help_create_text: New accounts are created from the "+" button on the toolbar.
web_access_help_create_b1: Username and password are required for sign-in.
web_access_help_create_b2: Choose a role (Moderator, Server Engineer, or Administrator) — it sets the default permission set.
web_access_help_create_b3: Fine-tune section access and server visibility before saving.
web_access_help_edit_text: Click a row in the user table to open the context menu.
web_access_help_edit_b1: Edit — change password, role, permissions, or server access.
web_access_help_edit_b2: Enable / Disable — disabled users cannot sign in but remain in the list.
web_access_help_edit_tip: The last active administrator cannot be deleted or disabled — create another admin first.
web_access_help_roles_text: A role is a starting template; you can still adjust individual permissions per user.
web_access_help_roles_b1: Moderator — player management, chat, bans, whitelist, and history.
web_access_help_roles_b2: Server Engineer — server control, settings, mods, modpacks, maintenance, and commands.
web_access_help_roles_b3: Administrator — full access to every server panel section plus this Users tab and program settings.
web_access_help_perms_text: Permissions control which tabs appear when the user opens a server's control panel.
web_access_help_perms_b1: Control — start/stop, saves, logs, and Factorio updates.
web_access_help_perms_b2: Server settings, Maintenance, Mods, Modpacks, Commands, Players — each maps to a panel tab.
web_access_help_perms_b3: Administrators always have every permission; other roles can mix and match checkboxes.
web_access_help_servers_text: Restrict which instances appear in the user's server list.
web_access_help_servers_b1: All servers — user sees and can open every instance in Factorio Control Center.
web_access_help_servers_b2: Selected servers only — check individual servers; all others are hidden and cannot be selected.
web_access_admin_only: Only administrators can manage web panel users.
web_admin_edit_no_permission: You do not have permission to edit the admin list.
web_last_admin_forbidden: Cannot remove, disable, or demote the last administrator account.
web_ban_invalid_input: That player name is not valid (max 128 characters, no line breaks).
players_send_message_no_commands: Commands are blocked here. Enter plain chat text only.
announce_list_empty: No announcements yet. Click Add to create one.
announce_need_select: Select an announcement in the list.
announce_empty_message: Add at least one non-empty line in the announcement text.
announce_skip_when_no_players: Do not send when no players are online
instances_default_password_banner: Default admin password (admin/admin) is still active. Change it in the Users tab.
instances_empty_intro: Add your first Factorio server to get started.
instances_empty_step1_text: Click the + button in the toolbar or the button below.
instances_empty_step2_text: Enter a name and choose a folder — an existing server directory, or an empty one to download server files. Then click the server in the list for the menu, or double-click.
instances_search_placeholder: Search by name, port, version, status…
instances_help_intro: Here you see all your Factorio servers in one place. Check status and players online, start or stop a game, and open the control panel when you need saves, mods, chat, or settings.
instances_help_add_text: Press + to add a server to the list.
instances_help_add_b1: Pick a name you will recognize.
instances_help_add_b2: Choose a folder with an existing server or create a new empty one.
instances_help_add_b3: Set the game port and RCON port — each server needs its own.
instances_help_add_b4: You can turn on autostart, open this panel automatically after login, or block updates for this server.
instances_help_row_menu_text: Click a row to work with that server.
instances_help_row_menu_b1: Single click — menu: open panel, start, stop, kill, edit, clone, delete, end maintenance.
instances_help_row_menu_b2: Double click — open the control panel right away.
instances_help_row_menu_b3: Edit, clone, and delete are unavailable while the server is running.
instances_help_badges_text: Extra marks next to a server name tell you more at a glance. Hover for a tooltip.
instances_help_badges_b1: Pulsing dot — the server is running.
instances_help_badges_b2: Mod icons — Space Age, Krastorio 2, Nullius, Space Exploration, Ultracube, Pyanodons, Angel's mods, and other major overhauls enabled on that server.
instances_help_badges_b3: Small icons — autostart on panel launch, open this panel after login, updates blocked.
instances_help_badges_b4: Wrench icon before the name — the server is in maintenance.
instances_help_badges_tip: Mod icons appear only when the matching mod is enabled in the server's mod list.
instances_help_maintenance_text: What to do when a server is being updated or waiting for you:
instances_help_maintenance_b1: Automatic updates — wait until the task finishes; you cannot start the server meanwhile.
instances_help_maintenance_b2: Manual mode — the server stopped for your changes; start when you are done, or end maintenance without starting.
instances_help_maintenance_b3: Start all skips servers that are updating. End maintenance on all clears every server in manual maintenance at once.
instances_help_maintenance_tip: Scheduled tasks are set up on the Maintenance tab — open Help there for details.
instances_help_row_menu_tip: When you open a server, every tab in the panel — Control, Mods, Settings, Commands, and the rest — applies to that server. To switch, open another server from the list.
instances_help_bulk_text: Toolbar buttons on the right act on many servers together.
instances_help_bulk_b1: Start all — boots every stopped server that is ready.
instances_help_bulk_b2: Stop all — shuts down running servers normally.
instances_help_bulk_b3: Kill all — force quit immediately; unsaved progress will be lost. Use only in an emergency.
instances_help_bulk_b4: End maintenance on all — appears when any server waits in manual maintenance.
instances_autostart_help: Automatically starts this server when the web panel starts.
instances_auto_enter_help: Automatically opens this server's control panel after user sign-in.
instances_block_updates_help: Disables Factorio and mod updates for this server, including maintenance tasks.
instances_experimental_updates_help: Allows the Factorio experimental channel to be used when checking and installing updates from the panel and maintenance tasks.
updates_blocked_by_instance_setting: This server has updates blocked in the server card.
instances_start_all_confirm_msg: Start {0} stopped server(s)? Each will use its configured save. Servers in maintenance, without a valid save, or with a busy game port will be skipped.
instances_kill_all_confirm_msg: Force-kill {0} server process(es)? Unsaved progress since the last autosave will be lost.
instances_server_path_help: Path to server files or an empty folder.
instances_delete_detach_hint: The server will be detached from the panel
instances_delete_data_cb: Delete data (maintenance logs, server logs, announcements)
instances_delete_disk_warn:
Warning: all files at this path will be deleted: 
{0}. 
This action cannot be undone.
instances_delete_disk_progress_hint: Removing the server folder from disk. Do not close the panel.
instances_clone_progress_hint: Copying server files and settings. This may take a while.
instances_error_server_running: Cannot switch/edit/clone/delete while selected server is running.
instances_error_port_in_use: This game port is already used by another server.
instances_error_game_port_duplicate: This game port is already assigned to another server.
instances_error_invalid_rcon_host: RCON host cannot be 0.0.0.0 or ::. Use 127.0.0.1 or a specific IP.
instances_error_path_exists: A server with this path already exists: {0}.
instances_error_no_credentials: Factorio credentials are required to download server files. Fill them in Settings.
instances_error_template_extract_failed: Failed to unpack downloaded server files.
instances_error_template_invalid: Downloaded files do not look like a valid Factorio server.
instances_error_template_download_failed: Failed to download server files from Factorio.
instances_error_template_download_incomp: Server package download is incomplete (file was not fully received).
instances_download_package_help: Downloads a server package from Factorio and unpacks it into the selected folder.
instances_download_creds_settings_hint: To use server package download, fill Factorio credentials in Settings.
instances_download_existing_server_disab: The selected folder already contains a Factorio server. It will be added without package download.
api_error_missing_server_settings: server-settings.json is missing. Open Server settings to create it automatically, or create the file before starting the server.
api_error_not_in_list: This save is not in the launch list. Refresh the save selector on the Control tab.
api_error_no_factorio_exe: Factorio server executable not found in the instance folder.
api_error_commands_not_allowed: Chat does not allow commands starting with / or \.
